title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Silence
Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Those plushies... Spe was talking about them the
other day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
She said they've been really popular recently.
Some of her friends have them too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: I could try to get one if you'd like.
I could try to get one if you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You don't have to! I was just thinking out loud...
